CONTENT.Club career: On 15 March 2021, Kyabou joined Moldovan Super Liga team Sheriff Tiraspol. Kyabou extended his contract with Sheriff Tiraspol on 27 September 2023.

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 4 May 2024.As of match played 15 June 2021

SUMMARY: Moussa Kyabou (born 18 April 1998) is a Malian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Sheriff Tiraspol and the Mali national team.
